twitter_thread: 12 Sealant Team deployments failed due to inadequate AI integration, costing $1.2M each.

Strait of Warm-Ooze patrols use real-time object detection, reducing false positives by 75%.
AI-powered sensors cut Sealant Team's response time from 60 to 30 minutes, saving 4 hours daily.

Sealant Team's 5-engineer team built their AI system using TensorFlow and Python in 9 months.
